components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Call to action button with neon glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #60a5fa; color: #111827; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; border: none; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 0 0px rgba(96, 165, 250, 0); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3); background: #93c5fd; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Main container for projects and sections.
components.html:
Project Name

A brief description of the technical work done.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1f2937; border-radius: 24px; padding: 32px; border: 1px solid #374151; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #60a5fa; } .ds-card-title { color: #f3f4f6; font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-card-text { color: #9ca3af; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview: The design system is built on a foundation of technical sophistication and immersive storytelling. It embraces a high-contrast dark mode where vibrant neon accents act as light sources in a deep charcoal environment.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Neon accents are used sparingly—on no more than 10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Glow Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements should emit a subtle glow in their primary color.

rules.name: The Atmospheric Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth is created by placing lighter surfaces on top of darker ones.

dos: Do use gradients sparingly to draw attention.
Do use icons for tech stack recognition.
donts: Don't use heavy, dark drop shadows.
